gaps: Structured petition-stage features such as questions presented, relists, CVSGs, amicus activity, and known lower-court conflict signals would materially improve SCOTUS petition predictions.
helpful: The path helper resolved the event location.
The snapshot provided the court, source court, filing date, judgment date, and rehearing-denial date.
notes: The prediction did not use corpus-query priors; it relied on the provided snapshot and general Supreme Court certiorari standards.
